'''''Krieger''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that was part of the forces of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], ''Krieger'' was placed under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dor Reder]]. Its last known location was the [[Hanod system/Legends|Hanod system]].
